name: ob-behavioral-node-runtime
description: Vendored offline runtime closure for running model-generated Node Online Boutique services under the Track 2 behavioral harness (FR-T2-DEPS). Copied into each cell workdir so the generated server runs with no network fetch (dependency quarantine). Closure = the real OB paymentservice deps: gRPC + the pino logger + uuid (the pilot showed models require these without declaring them).
